hero.title: Zero Ambiguity Intelligence
hero.tagline: The engine of Spec Driven Development

demo.title: From ambiguity to spec — in color
demo.description: Every prompt carries some ambiguity. ZAI measures it, and Spec Driven Development closes the gap. Move the sliders to see how ambiguity and spec coverage blend into a single signal.

app.title: ZAI App
app.coming_soon: Coming soon. The ZAI spec generator and translation round-trip are in active development.

pricing.title: Editions
pricing.subtitle: Pick the edition that matches your spec surface area.

free.name: Free
free.description: Single project, basic spec generation, community support.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlimited projects, translation round-trip, RGB score, email support.

pro_plus.name: Pro+
pro_plus.description: Team workspaces, private models, priority support.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: SSO, audit logs, on-prem, named account manager.
